title: Planning, Dependencies, and Adaptive Decomposition · Failure Case: Milestones
summary: Plan a migration whose dependencies and risks emerge during work. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops milestones increment in a dependency-aware adaptive execution plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose milestones that leave a verified, restartable artifact.
Order outcomes by prerequisite evidence rather than arbitrary file sequence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
